comment: Canned research results standing in for the AGENT HOOKs in developing.js — in production these come from Claude + web research per claim.

corroborations.sourceDescription: Ada's public employment history and former colleague profile
Minh's robotics paper and product repository
One signed pilot contract; one founder-provided invoice

contradictions.nextAction: Request revenue export and contract schedule

gaps.nextAction: Obtain deployment logs from both pilots

hypotheses.text: Demonstrates high learning velocity — test with a non-leading question about a failed launch
Commercial ownership may be unclear — ask who owns the pipeline and closed the last customer

Founder.rationale: Relevant execution and research history; commercial depth untested [CLM-001][CLM-002]

Market.rationale: Labour pressure supports adoption; integrator competition is credible [SRC-007]

Idea vs. market.rationale: Pilots validate urgency; repeatable integration path unproven [CLM-003][GAP-003]
